meta.mode: read-only CPU archaeology (no GPU, no checkout, no worktree needed; pure git log/show/diff/grep)
meta.net_product_diff: git diff 5e2ab3055de daa79cd25ca -- torch/_inductor torch/utils/_sympy/value_ranges.py = 36 files, +13821 / -200

a1_sweep_estimate.total_ab_states_recommended: B=HEAD plus ~24 single-flag-off arms plus ~5 selective-revert arms = ~30 arms (~15 sweeps if A is shared HEAD); proxy-first prune expected to leave ~6-10 movers
a1_sweep_estimate.note: Each flag-toggleable unit needs only ONE extra arm (HEAD with that one flag off) since A=HEAD is shared. The 5 selective-revert items + the CORE-realization family need cumulative-style arms.

phase1_corrections: Phase-1 said '~24 units (11 separable + 1 entangled core)'. CORRECTED: 33 distinct feature-units; 29 contribute non-zero; 24 are individually FLAG-TOGGLEABLE (Phase-1 under-counted toggleability by lumping evict_first/scalar_acc/online-softmax/split-reduction/realize-on-reuse into one cumulative-only CORE blob -- each has its own config flag).

Phase-1 'CORE triton-codegen unit (cumulative-only)' is WRONG: evict_first_requires_aligned_strides, online_softmax_fast_combine, scalar_reduction_accumulators, scalar_acc_configs_without_cd are all config.triton.* flags = flag-toggleable A/B, not cumulative-only.

Phase-1 'split-reduction cost model (cumulative-only)' is WRONG: split_reductions_for_undersaturated_gpu, _for_partially_saturated_gpu, segment_aligned_split_reductions, split_multilayer_second_step, split_reductions_for_fusion are each separate flags = toggleable.

Phase-1 'scheduler-realization (cumulative-only)' partly WRONG: inline_recomputable_producers, inline_cheap_producers_into_stencils, realize_heavy_transcendentals_on_reuse, realize_indirect_indexing_on_reuse are each flags = toggleable. Only the argmax/argmin tie-break (ir.py) and persistent-threshold/cooperative-widen (choices/heuristics) are truly NO-FLAG.

scatter_reduce_fusion.py is NOT one unit -- it hosts 5 separately-flagged passes: scatter_reduce_fusion, scatter_add_reduce_elimination, scatter_add_into_fusion(+chained), reduce_scatter_distribution. Split into 4 units.

reduction_chaining.py (216L, seeded by mega-commit) is DEAD CODE at HEAD: never imported/called; its config gate config.triton.reduction_chaining is not even in the config.py diff (reads a missing attr default False). Contributes ZERO. Do not land.

CE gather-into-softmax = a real NEW fused reduction 'online_softmax_cross_entropy' (new prim cross_entropy_loss_online in inductor_prims.py + ops_handler.py +1 + lowering.py + codegen/triton.py). NOT flag-gated -> selective revert. Phase-1 buried it inside CORE.

MOR (multi-output-reduction) Triton finalize = simd.py _emit_triton_finalize_sum (+176). NOT flag-gated -> selective revert. (MOR sibling fusion enable in ir.py IS gated by config._sibling_reduction_fusion, which is False at HEAD.)
reduced_atomic_contention.py / partitioned_scatter_* flags exist at baseline 5e2ab -> UPSTREAM, excluded (Phase-1 did not list, correctly).
Degenerate-dropout-elimination pass: added+reverted TWICE -> net zero, not a unit (confirmed in post_grad.py history).

landability_summary.cleanly_independent_note: These are new fx_passes/*.py files (or self-contained post_grad rewrites) gated by their own config flag; only textual coupling is the post_grad.py registry. U11 (diagonal_skew) is independent-ish with an 11-line scatter_reduce_fusion shim -> land after U01. Count is 19 in the list (U01-U21 minus U11,U19 which need notes) -- conservatively 17 truly clean + U11 + U19 = 19 independent-capable.
landability_summary.entangled_note: 12 units live in shared core files (choices/scheduler/ir/triton/simd/heuristics). 7 of these (U22-U29) are still FLAG-TOGGLEABLE for A/B even though they share files. 5 (U30 MOR, U31 CE, U32 argmax, plus the no-flag parts of U33 and U25's fix-chain) need selective revert / cumulative benching.
